calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Feb-04-2010 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 10:00am
Judge Pro Tem Richard Grotch, clerk-Leslie Gomez, nothing on record, dept 525.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Patelco Credit Union appears through Loreaner Lopez and Kevin Wong. Respondent, Olga Kaplan appears in pro per. Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Grotch.

Both parties hand documents directly to Judge Pro Tem Grotch. These documents are not marked as exhibits, but have been retained. Case is taken under submission.

10:35am

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Nov-24-2009 Judgment Entered
